hooks.command: python -c "import json,sys,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','').replace('\\','/'); skip=(not fp.endswith('.py')) or ('us_swing/src/us_swing' not in fp) or fp.endswith('__init__.py'); print(f'[skeleton-guard] Reading {os.path.basename(fp)} directly. Rule: query skeleton extractor first.\n  python -m skeleton_extractor query --find <symbol>\n  python -m skeleton_extractor query --overview <subfolder>') if not skip else None" 2>/dev/null || true

python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); open('.claude/.pending_review','a').write(fp+'\n') if fp.endswith('.py') else None" 2>/dev/null || true
